description_long: This is a round chocolate cake with a textured, dark brown exterior resembling chocolate shavings or flakes. The top of the cake is decorated with eight evenly spaced dollops of white cream, each topped with a bright red cherry-like garnish. A single tall, thin candle is placed at the center of the cake, adding a celebratory touch. The cake sits on a crimped, golden-brown base that appears to be a decorative paper or foil tray. The cake has a single visible horizontal layer, suggesting a classic layered cake structure. The overall appearance is festive and inviting, suitable for birthdays or celebrations in an urban park or street setting.
description: A round chocolate cake with cream and cherry decorations, topped with a single candle and set on a golden tray. The cake has a textured chocolate exterior and a festive appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the candle centered and all eight cream and cherry decorations clearly visible on the textured chocolate surface.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the candle still prominent, revealing more of the cake's right side and the golden tray's crimped edge.
description_view_2: View from the back left, with the candle visible and the decorations slightly offset, showing the cake's layered structure.
description_view_3: Rear view with the candle at the back, highlighting the cake's textured chocolate surface and the golden tray's edge.
